query_intent: For each store, compare day-of-week sales ratios between two consecutive 12-month periods starting at month sequence 1196 by aligning weeks exactly 52 apart.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate store sales by week and store into Sunday-through-Saturday sales buckets.
Build year1 and year2 weekly views from the bucketed data, match same store and week offset by 52, and compute day-level ratio comparisons.
